commits: 643fb72: docs(0.5.3-RACE): design memo — atomic threat_score RMW + identity consolidation
404b9e7: test(0.5.3-RACE): RED — no-lost-update, golden identity, characterization tests
b458c7d: fix(0.5.3-RACE): atomic threat_score RMW under lock; consolidate client identity

design.mutator_signature: StateStore.record_threat_score(client: ClientState, score: float, now: float, *, decay_base: float, threshold: float, base_backoff_s: float, max_backoff_s: float) -> tuple[combined: float, blocked: bool, backoff_seconds: float]
design.what_it_locks: Holds StateStore._lock for the entire read-modify-write: snapshots client.request_times (computes elapsed/decay), reads client.threat_score, applies combined = max(score, prev * decay_base**elapsed), writes client.threat_score and (when blocked) client.backoff_until, returns the assessment tuple. Constants are passed in by assess_threat so state.py needs no threat_detector import (no cycle). assess_threat keeps the four heuristics and the logger.warning OUTSIDE the lock.

identity_consolidation_map.airlock/fast/state.py: re-exports NO_CLIENT_ID + normalize_client_id from client_identity (removed its own copies); all state.normalize_client_id callers now hit the canonical impl
identity_consolidation_map.airlock/fast/guardian.py: _extract_client_id -> client_id_from_api_key; _request_client_id -> extract_airlock_client_from_request (kept by name as thin delegators because test_fast_guardian imports them)
identity_consolidation_map.airlock/callbacks/enterprise_logger.py: READ-ONLY, unchanged; already routes through client_identity.extract_airlock_client_from_kwargs + state.normalize_client_id (now canonical) — golden test proves parity

design.golden_input_set: normalize_client_id(None/''/'   '/'app'/'  app  '); client_id_from_api_key(None, _FakeKey('sk-1234567890abcdef')->key:90abcdef, dict variant, short-key->no_client, {}, {'api_key':'short'}); extract_airlock_client_from_request across metadata.airlock_client (incl. whitespace->no_client without api-key fallthrough), data headers (x-airlock-client / X-Airlock-Client), metadata headers (airlock-client), api-key fallback, None->no_client, metadata-wins-over-key; plus guardian-delegator parity and enterprise_logger parity assertions.
design.config_consolidation: DEFERRED — lowest priority per prompt §4; would balloon across DO NOT TOUCH files. Race fix + identity consolidation only.

tests.note: The single failure is the known pre-existing fathom env/db failure documented at baseline (suite green except 1 fathom env failure); unrelated to this pack. Stress suite (pytest -m stress): 5 passed.

additional_changes_made_in_scope: Kept guardian._extract_client_id / _request_client_id as thin delegators (not removed) because tests/test_fast_guardian.py imports them by name; monitor.py + guardrails/* copies are DO NOT TOUCH and were left untouched.
Removed now-unused normalize_client_id import from guardian.py (replaced by canonical request extractor).
agent_verify_result: pass (full suite: 1 failed [known fathom env], 2374 passed, 107 skipped, 1 xpassed; stress: 5 passed; ruff check + format clean on all changed files)
next_step_for_orchestrator: Pack 0.5.3-RACE on branch feat/0.5.3-RACE at b458c7d; review, verify, merge. Config-loading consolidation deferred (out of scope).
